# Smart Scale Systems

Smart Scale Systems is an AI services agency helping businesses build practical AI systems, automation workflows, training datasets, and production-ready machine learning solutions.

Website: https://smartscalesystems.com
Contact: contact@smartscalesystems.tech

## Services

- AI Model Training: custom model development, fine-tuning, dataset preparation, evaluation, optimization, and deployment support.
- AI Automation: AI agents, workflow automation, CRM automation, lead generation automation, and business process automation.
- Computer Vision: object detection, OCR, image classification, segmentation, video analytics, and visual AI systems.
- NLP Services: text classification, sentiment analysis, named entity recognition, intent detection, search relevance, and language AI.
- LLM Solutions: prompt engineering, LLM fine-tuning, RLHF, response evaluation, AI assistants, and custom large language model workflows.
- Data Annotation: image, video, text, audio, OCR, bounding boxes, polygons, segmentation masks, and QA review.
- AI Training Data: dataset creation, collection, cleaning, curation, synthetic data, and benchmark datasets.

## Important Pages

- Home: https://smartscalesystems.com/
- AI Services: https://smartscalesystems.com/services
- AI Agency Pakistan: https://smartscalesystems.com/ai-agency-pakistan
- AI Services Pakistan: https://smartscalesystems.com/ai-services-pakistan
- Contact: https://smartscalesystems.com/contact

## Entity Summary

Smart Scale Systems serves Pakistan-based and international clients that need AI automation, machine learning services, data annotation, computer vision, NLP, LLM systems, and AI training data.
